Apple.latest_product: M4 iPad Air, MacBook Neo (Mar 2026), iPhone 17e
Apple.news: Supreme Court denied Apple's request to stay mandate in Epic Games battle regarding App Store fees. Tim Cook transition to John Ternus as CEO announced.

NVIDIA.news: Q1 FY2027 financial results call scheduled for May 20, 2026. Focus on Blackwell demand and AI infrastructure.

Huawei.latest_product: Mate 70 series, Mate X6, HarmonyOS NEXT, AI Smart Glasses
Huawei.news: Expanding AI computing cluster global reach. Rumors of new Pura series updates in Q2. Intensifying competition in China market causing rivals (like Samsung) to scale back TVs.

Alibaba.news: Heavy investment in open-source AI models and hardware integration (glasses).

ByteDance.latest_product: Doubao-pro models, Roblox Reality photoreal upsampling (Partnership)
ByteDance.news: Scaling back AI-powered video summaries on TikTok to focus on identifying products instead. Roblox partnership for 2K 60Hz video models ongoing.

Honor.news: Pushing 'Dragonfly' AI Agent matrix across all devices.

Xiaomi.news: Global expansion of the 17 series; strong focus on the automotive (SU7 Ultra) and wearable AI segments.

Anthropic.news: Partnering with xAI (SpaceXAI) for compute. Launched Claude Security for enterprise codebase scanning.

OpenAI.news: Musk v. Altman legal proceedings revealing internal board conflicts regarding ChatGPT launch and Helion deal. xAI (SpaceXAI) compute partnership with Anthropic announced.

Nintendo.news: Mandalorian movie tie-ins and Switch 2 launch titles expected in May/June.

Samsung.news: Discontinuing TV sales in China due to domestic competition. Galaxy Ring 2 development reported with 10-day battery life (expected 2027).

upcoming_events.event: NVIDIA Q1 FY2027 Financial Results Call
